title: lasthenia glabrata var. californica
intro: Lasthenia glabrata var. californica, also known as California goldfields, is a perennial herb belonging to the dandelion family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lasthenia glabrata var. californica include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
